directive_requirement: €200 lower limit abolished; ceiling raised to €100,000; BNPL, credit cards and authorised overdrafts brought into scope
nl_implementation: 'Verlenen van uitstel van betaling' added to credit (Wft 1:1); art 1:20 exceptions narrowed; AFM licence (Wft 2:60) needed; narrow ≤50-day BNPL exception

provision: Ban on credit to minors (CCD2 art 6)
directive_requirement: Member-State option for objective-justified age differentiation
nl_implementation: New Wft 4:34b public-law ban on deferred-payment credit to minors + mandatory age verification; BW 7:75(4) makes such agreements voidable
status: In bill 36924 (legal basis changed to CCD2 art 6 after RvS advice)

directive_requirement: Member States may exempt deferred-debit cards
nl_implementation: NL does not exempt but applies the rules 6 months later than the rest of the act

directive_requirement: Ban on misleading credit advertising; standard information requirements
nl_implementation: BW 7:59 recast (oneerlijke handelspraktijk + 'lenen kost geld' warning); ban on downplaying a BKR registration; four new BGfo advertising prohibitions (via AMvB)

provision: Pre-contractual information, explanations & personalised offers (CCD2 arts 9-13)
directive_requirement: SECCI-style information modernised; adequate explanations; disclosure of automated personalised offers
nl_implementation: BW 7:60 recast: comparable pre-contractual info, late-info withdrawal reminder, adequate explanation, personalised-offer disclosure; breach = oneerlijke handelspraktijk

directive_requirement: Bundling allowed but tying prohibited; equivalent-insurance acceptance; 3-day insurance comparison; no pre-ticked default options
nl_implementation: New BW 7:60a (tying ban + account/insurance carve-outs) and 7:60b (oncological-data limit); affirmative consent in BW 7:58a

directive_requirement: Disclosure of advice; suitability; record of recommendation; best-interest duty
nl_implementation: Wft 4:23 extended: duty to give the consumer a copy of the credit advice on a durable medium

directive_requirement: No granting of credit without the consumer's prior request and explicit agreement
nl_implementation: BW 7:58a(1): agreement only at the consumer's request; Wft 4:34c borging duty bringing it under AFM supervision

directive_requirement: Assessment 'necessary and proportionate'; ban on social-network data and special-category data
nl_implementation: Wft 4:34 recast; new Wft 4:34a bans social-network/special-category data; AMvB removes €1,000 verification & €250 BKR thresholds

directive_requirement: Non-discriminatory access; 30-day arrears notice; disclosure of data categories on rejection
nl_implementation: Wft 4:32 adds 30-day arrears notice + categories-of-data disclosure; wider BKR/CKI reform in the adjacent kredietregistratie bill (keep_apart)

provision: Form & content of the agreement (CCD2 arts 20-21)
directive_requirement: Durable medium + copy; expanded mandatory content list incl. debt-advisory contacts
nl_implementation: BW 7:61 recast: phone/email of parties, arrears warning, durable-medium choice, new onderdeel x (debt-advisory contacts)

directive_requirement: Modification information duties; good-time notice of any borrowing-rate change
nl_implementation: BW 7:62: 'geruime tijd' advance notice; periodic-info derogation only for reference-rate-linked changes

directive_requirement: Monthly statements; 30-day notice of reduction; 12-instalment repayment; overrun referral to debt advice
nl_implementation: BW 7:63 (overdraft: ≥ monthly, 30-day notice, 12 instalments) and 7:70 (overrunning: referral + repayment right)

provision: Right of withdrawal & linked credit (CCD2 arts 26-27)
directive_requirement: 14-day withdrawal; 12-months-14-days backstop if terms missing; linked-credit unbinding
nl_implementation: BW 7:66: 12-months-14-days backstop where terms not provided; extension to match a >14-day return policy

directive_requirement: Free termination of open-end credit; early-repayment cost reduction; capped compensation
nl_implementation: BW 7:68: all costs counted in the cost reduction; compensation threshold lifted €75,000 to €100,000

directive_requirement: Harmonised APR formula (Annex III) and total-cost-of-credit components
nl_implementation: Formula in the Besluit kredietvergoeding; BW 7:71 updates the art 19 to art 30 cross-reference

provision: Caps on rate / APR / total cost (CCD2 art 31)
directive_requirement: Mandatory measures to prevent excessively high borrowing rates, APRs or total costs — 'such as caps'
nl_implementation: Largely pre-existing: the maximale kredietvergoeding under BW 7:76; measures reported to the Commission by 20 Nov 2026

directive_requirement: Honest, fair, transparent and professional conduct; remuneration must not impede it
nl_implementation: Largely pre-existing Wft 4:24a zorgplicht + BGfo beloningsregels; new credit types fitted into the framework

directive_requirement: Up-to-date staff knowledge and competence; minimum requirements; competent-authority supervision
nl_implementation: Delivered via the existing Wft 4:9 / BGfo vakbekwaamheid regime, with AFM as supervisor

directive_requirement: Promote consumer education on responsible borrowing and debt management
nl_implementation: Mainly non-legislative (Wijzer in geldzaken etc.); treated as a promotional duty in the MvT

directive_requirement: Reasonable forbearance before enforcement; early detection and referral to debt advisory services
nl_implementation: New Wft 4:35b (early detection + referral) and BW 7:68a (referral duty); existing arrears-respite in BW 70a/128aa + Wft 4:35a

directive_requirement: Admission, registration and supervision of non-bank creditors/intermediaries; intermediary disclosure
nl_implementation: AFM licence (2:60) for in-scope providers; Wft 2:64c + 2:81 (ancillary/large-supplier regime)

directive_requirement: Consumer may plead defences against an assignee; notice of assignment
nl_implementation: Existing BW Boek 7 + Boek 6 cessie rules; conforming references only

provision: Out-of-court dispute resolution & competent authorities (CCD2 arts 40-41)
directive_requirement: Adequate out-of-court ADR; independent competent authority; optional product-intervention power
nl_implementation: Kifid ADR; AFM as authority; new Wft 1:77q product-intervention power; penalties added to the 1:79/1:80 annexes

directive_requirement: Maximum harmonisation; effective/proportionate/dissuasive penalties; CCD1 repealed 20 Nov 2026 with a transitional regime
nl_implementation: Penalties via Wft 1:79/1:80; transitional regime in Overgangswet NBW 211a; entry into force 20 Nov 2026 (+6m deferred-debit)
